summary: Tested 'Continue in Chat' bug fix in MiraSearchPanel.jsx. The fix changed 'pet' to 'selectedPet' at line 223. Bug is FIXED - NO JavaScript errors ('pet is not defined') when clicking Continue in Chat.

bug_reproduction.after_fix: No errors - selectedPet is correctly used

celebrate_page_test.flow: Navigate to /celebrate -> Type 'birthday cake for dog' -> Click search -> Wait for Mira response -> Click 'Continue in Chat'

context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug 'ReferenceError: pet is not defined' in MiraSearchPanel.jsx handleConciergeClick function has been fixed. The fix changed 'pet' to 'selectedPet' at line 223. Testing confirmed NO JavaScript errors occur when clicking 'Continue in Chat' button from the universal search bar on /celebrate, /learn, and /dine pages. The Mira widget opens correctly with pillar context and search query passed.
